scripts.create: rm -rf dist/* && mkdir -p dist && cp src/* dist/
scripts.deploy: npm run make:chrome && npm run make:firefox && npm run make:zip && npm run upload && rm key.pem && rm dataLayer-explorer.crx
scripts.make:chrome: npm run create && crx pack ./dist --output dataLayer-explorer.crx
scripts.make:firefox: npm run create && crx pack ./dist --zip-output dataLayer-explorer.zip && cp dataLayer-explorer.zip dataLayer-explorer.xpi
scripts.make:zip: npm run create && crx pack ./dist --zip-output dataLayer-explorer.zip
